name: Lettuce with Pomegranate & Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pine nuts in a skillet and toast them over moderate heat until golden brown, stirring constantly.
2. Set aside the toasted pine nuts.
3. Roll spinach leaves into a tight cigar shape and cut crosswise into 1/8-inch chiffonade or shreds.
4. Combine lettuce and spinach in a salad bowl.
5. Drizzle with oil, season with salt and pepper, toss to mix.
6. Sprinkle with pomegranate seeds, pine nuts, and lemon juice.
